title: Warm up
content: Images depict scenes from Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, highlighting unique aspects or features of each location from a driver's perspective.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide introduces the theme of an evolving nation with a focus on China. Imagery includes taxis and landmarks from various cities, suggesting modernization and development.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session involves investigating and researching cities, emphasizing local features, development strategies, and their outcomes and impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Cities are matched with their development strategies: Beijing integrates technology and tradition, Chongqing focuses on sustainable development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide illustrates the perspectives of taxi drivers in urban development, underscoring how cities develop unique strategies based on local features.
